programme.title: Where It Lies
programme.desc: Where it Lies is the first docuseries to explore the real world of public golf, where quirky characters, hidden histories, and thriving local cultures collide on the course. Each episode uses a public course as a gateway into a city's food, music, traditions, and personalities, revealing how golf shapes—and is shaped by—the communities that play it. Authentic, cinematic, and offbeat, the series uncovers the game's most relatable side while celebrating its accessibility and diversity.

programme.desc: Where it Lies is the first docuseries to explore the real world of public golf, where quirky characters, hidden histories, and thriving local cultures collide on the course. Each episode uses a public course as a gateway into a city's food, music, traditions, and personalities, revealing how golf shapes—and is shaped by—the communities that play it. Authentic, cinematic, and offbeat, the series uncovers the game's most relatable side while celebrating its accessibility and diversity.

programme.desc: Two sexy spies-turned-corporate operatives find themselves on either side of an all-out corporate war, even though they are having an affair.

programme.desc: Hunting a terrorist who has destroyed most of the fleet, the crew of the Enterprise must take a leap into unknown territory where loyalties will be tested and ultimate sacrifices made.

programme.title: Pain & Gain
programme.desc: Based on the unbelievable true story: a group of personal trainers in 1990s Miami, who in pursuit of the American dream, get caught up in a criminal enterprise that goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: F9: The Fast Saga
programme.desc: The true meaning of family gets tested like never before as Dom Toretto takes the team on a worldwide ride with high-stakes action, old friends and a surprising new foe.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex con is out to avenge the murder of his brother during a botched robbery, but the circumstances of the actual killing become muddled and the killer obscure.

programme.title: Repo Men
programme.desc: In futuristic Toronto a repo man pursues customers that can no longer pay for their implanted organs.

programme.title: R.I.P.D.
programme.desc: After a cop is murdered by his partner, he ends up in the afterlife, where he joins a special police force protecting the living from souls that refuse to leave. He teams up with a former Old West sheriff to stop his partner from destroying the world.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: The mummified body of Imhotep is shipped to a museum in London, where he once again wakes and begins his campaign of rage and terror.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt must bring down a ruthless villain and rescue his fiancee.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Humans are at war with the Transformers, and Optimus Prime is gone. It's now up to an unlikely alliance.

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: Based on the popular comic, a stray bullet hits an unlucky target transforming an apathetic slacker into an unparalleled enforcer of justice.

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back
programme.desc: When an Army Major is framed for treason, Reacher discovers she's the target of a massive government conspiracy and risks everything to take down the corrupt organisation.

programme.title: Ghost Rider
programme.desc: When motorcycle rider Johnny Blaze sells his soul to the Devil to save his father's life, he is transformed into the Ghost Rider, the Devil's own bounty hunter, and is sent to hunt down sinners.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: After being denied his dream job with the Secret Service, a cop with a bad attitude must save his daughter and the President after heavily armed militants take over the White House.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: An ultra-cool, fresh out of Detroit, foul-mouthed detective is treading on toes in Beverly Hills as he zeroes in on the scum who killed his friend.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A spy is on a mission to disprove false accusations made against him by the very government organisation that he works for.

programme.title: Indiana Jones And The Last Crusade
programme.desc: In this third instalment of the great adventure saga, Indy is on a treacherous quest for the Holy Grail, complicated by a sexy woman with a fatal flaw: she's a Nazi agent.

programme.title: Dracula Untold
programme.desc: When his wife and child are in danger, a young prince from the Draculea dynasty makes a dark sacrifice to save them. He becomes the first vampire and the man who inspires the legend of Dracula.

programme.title: Elysium
programme.desc: The wealthy live in luxury on a space station while the rest fight for scraps on a ruined Earth. Then one man is given an opportunity to even the score.

programme.title: Inglourious Basterds
programme.desc: As war rages in Europe, a Nazi-scalping squad of American soldiers, known to their enemy as The Basterds, is on a daring mission to take down the leaders of the Third Reich.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise Of Cobra
programme.desc: In Kazakhstan, a convoy carrying advanced nanotech warheads is attacked. Rescued by an elite military unit, two soldiers join the team as they track a criminal group behind the assault, uncovering a deeper conspiracy.```

programme.title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation
programme.desc: The G.I. Joes are not only fighting their mortal enemy Cobra; they are forced to contend with threats from within the government that jeopardise their very existence.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: When Eddie Brock acquires the powers of a symbiote, he will have to release his alter-ego "Venom" to save his life.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: A gang of double-crossed thieves attempt to reclaim their stolen gold and avenge their mentor's death by creating the largest ever traffic jam in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: Cybertron has fallen. When Optimus Prime sends Bumblebee to protect Earth, he begins his journey to become the hero the Universe needs.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge Of The Fallen
programme.desc: Two years after saving the world, Sam Witwicky returns to university as the Autobots and humans work together to stop a returning Decepticon threat, while pressure builds to remove the robots from Earth.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop returns to Los Angeles to solve another case. This time, he must direct his efforts towards unravelling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by punks.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Archaeologists awaken an Egyptian priest mummified alive 36 centuries ago for killing Pharaoh Seti and sleeping with his mistress. When he escapes from the tomb, he becomes a threat to the world.

programme.title: The Invitation
programme.desc: An unknown cousin invites Evie to a lavish wedding in the countryside. Soon she realises a conspiracy is afoot and must fight for survival as she uncovers secrets in her family's history.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
programme.desc: Set in 1998, this origin story explores the secrets of the mysterious Spencer Mansion and the ill-fated Raccoon City.

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: MI6's most lethal assassin is sent on a covert mission into Cold War Berlin where she must use all of the spy-craft, sensuality, and savagery she has to stay alive.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Born in hell and bred to be evil, Hellboy was rescued by a benevolent doctor who raised him to be a hero. Now he must thwart a madman who wants to steal his powers and destroy mankind.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb Of The Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: In the Far East, Alex O'Connell, the son of famed mummy fighters Rick and Evy O'Connell, unearths the mummy of the first Emperor of Qin - a shape-shifting entity cursed by a witch centuries ago.

programme.title: War Of The Worlds
programme.desc: Aliens have come to Earth in masses to destroy the planet. As they plough through the country in a wave of mass destruction and violence, a man must come to the defence of his estranged children.

programme.title: Warcraft: The Beginning
programme.desc: An epic adventure that sees a peaceful realm on the brink of war. Two heroes will be set on a collision course that will decide the fate of their family, their people and their home.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When Grissom, Warrick, Sara and Nick visit the site of a fatal carjacking, they must deal with the fact that heavy rainfall has washed away much of the crucial evidence.

programme.desc: The CSI team is called to an art house movie theatre to investigate the stabbing death of one its movie-goers and a gunshot death of a 15-year-old boy found in an abandoned warehouse.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine are stumped when the clues surrounding their investigation of a comedian's death has strong similarities to the case Warrick is investigating across town.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A stake lodged in the head of a man and the kidnapping of a professional basketball player's son has the CSI team occupied.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team is called to investigate when a car crashes into a restaurant and when a family member dies from carbon monoxide poisoning.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team delve into the world of robotic sports in their investigation of a murder victim and Greg works the field helping Warrick and Grissom solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the death of a horse trainer who appears to have been trampled to death on a private jet at 30,000 feet by her $1 million race horse.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI lab goes up in flames, the team investigates a strangling at a high school football stadium and sparks fly between Sara and Grissom.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: One of the CSI's own is killed during a bank heist, and Grissom is faced with a major decision while dealing with his hearing loss.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A series of double-homicide murders consume the CSI graveyard shift's attention as they work together to capture the killers.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI's continuing investigation of serial murderers takes an unsuspected turn when its suspects are found dead.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and Warrick get the case of an old woman found mummified in her closet. Sara and Nick arrive to investigate a breaking and entering to find a raped teen.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team is on high alert as the hot Las Vegas desert causes many heat-related deaths.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine and Grissom probe into the fetish world of Plushies and Furries after they discover the dead body of a man dressed in a full-size animal costume.

programme.title: Bend It Like Beckham
programme.desc: Instead of wanting to be like her older sister, who is preparing to be a traditional Indian wife, young Jess dreams of playing soccer professionally, like her hero David Beckham! Eventually, her family must decide whether or not to let Jess chase her dream – and a soccer ball – in this insightful romantic comedy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Last Days in the Desert
programme.desc: Suffused with mystery, and set against breath-taking landscapes, this bold and dramatic interpretation of the temptations of Christ explores Jesus’ confrontation with the devil in his last days fasting Judean desert. Finally contemplating a return to civilisation, and his imminent death, Jesus happens upon a troubled family dealing with a much more earthly problem: the young son being desperate to leave the familial home against his father’s wishes, in search of the big city.

programme.title: How to Talk to Girls at Parties
programme.desc: Sci-fi romance starring Alex Sharp and Elle Fanning. It's 1977 and, in Croydon, a teenage punk schoolboy encounters a beautiful young woman from outer space. Strong language.

programme.title: The Duke
programme.desc: In 1961, Kempton Bunton, a 60-year-old taxi driver, steals Goya's portrait of the Duke of Wellington from the National Gallery in London. Comedy drama, starring Jim Broadbent and Helen Mirren. The final film from Notting Hill director Roger Michell.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Hope Gap
programme.desc: Leaving September 30. Starring Bill Nighy, Annette Bening and Josh O'Connor. Grace enjoys an idyllic life in a British seaside town until her world is shattered when her husband of 29 years announces he's leaving her for another woman. As she navigates the stages of shock, disbelief, and anger, Grace, with the support of her son, gradually finds her footing again, discovering that it's never too late to find happiness.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Nowhere Boy
programme.desc: The story of John Lennon’s childhood, Liverpool 1955: a smart and troubled fifteen year-old is hungry for experience. In a family full of secrets, two incredible women clash over John. Yearning to escape, John flees into the new and exciting world of rock n' roll where his fledgling genius finds a kindred spirit in the teenage Paul McCartney. Just as John begins his new life, tragedy strikes.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Age of Heroes
programme.desc: A British army corporal is recruited into an elite commando unit under the command of a battle-hardened major during the Second World War. The soldiers are sent on a dangerous mission into occupied Norway to capture a vital German radar installation. Action adventure, with Sean Bean, Danny Dyer, Izabella Miko and James D'Arcy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Liability
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Adam agrees to do a day's driving for his mum's gangster boyfriend Peter, it takes him on a 24-hour journey into a nightmarish world of murder, sex trafficking and revenge, in the company of aging hit man Roy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Happy Prince
programme.desc: In a cheap Parisian hotel, Oscar Wilde lies on his death bed and recalls his past with wit and irony. Was he once the most famous man in London? He reviews the failed attempt to reconcile with his long-suffering wife, the ensuing reprisal of his fatal love affair with Lord Alfred Douglas and the devotion of Robbie Ross, who tried and failed to save him from himself.

programme.title: Last Days in the Desert
programme.desc: Suffused with mystery, and set against breath-taking landscapes, this bold and dramatic interpretation of the temptations of Christ explores Jesus’ confrontation with the devil in his last days fasting Judean desert. Finally contemplating a return to civilisation, and his imminent death, Jesus happens upon a troubled family dealing with a much more earthly problem: the young son being desperate to leave the familial home against his father’s wishes, in search of the big city.

programme.title: How to Talk to Girls at Parties
programme.desc: Sci-fi romance starring Alex Sharp and Elle Fanning. It's 1977 and, in Croydon, a teenage punk schoolboy encounters a beautiful young woman from outer space. Strong language.

programme.title: Mr. Turner
programme.desc: Mr. Turner explores the last quarter century of the great if eccentric British painter J.M.W. Turner (1775-1851).Profoundly affected by the death of his father, loved by a housekeeper he takes for granted and occasionally exploits sexually, he forms a close relationship with a seaside landlady with whom he eventually lives incognito in Chelsea, where he dies. Throughout this, he travels, paints, stays with the country aristocracy, visits brothels, is a popular if anarchic member of the Royal Academy of Arts, has himself strapped to the mast of a ship so that he can paint a snowstorm, and is both celebrated and reviled by the public and by royalty.

programme.title: Nowhere Boy
programme.desc: The story of John Lennon’s childhood, Liverpool 1955: a smart and troubled fifteen year-old is hungry for experience. In a family full of secrets, two incredible women clash over John. Yearning to escape, John flees into the new and exciting world of rock n' roll where his fledgling genius finds a kindred spirit in the teenage Paul McCartney. Just as John begins his new life, tragedy strikes.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Liability
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Adam agrees to do a day's driving for his mum's gangster boyfriend Peter, it takes him on a 24-hour journey into a nightmarish world of murder, sex trafficking and revenge, in the company of aging hit man Roy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Hyde Park on Hudson
programme.desc: In June 1939, President Franklin Delano Roosevelt (Academy Award-nominee Bill Murray) and his wife Eleanor (Olivia Williams) host the King and Queen of England (Samuel West, Olivia Colman) for a weekend at their upstate New York vacation home. With Britain facing imminent war with Germany, the Windsors are desperately looking to FDR for support. But international affairs must be juggled with the complexities of FDR's domestic establishment, as wife, mother and mistresses all conspire to make the royal weekend an unforgettable one. Also starring Academy Award-nominee Laura Linney.

programme.title: The Deep Blue Sea
programme.desc: Rachel Weisz stars as Hester Collyer, who leads a privileged life in 1950's London as the beautiful wife of high court judge Sir William Collyer (Simon Russell Beale). To the shock of those around her, she walks out on her marriage to move in with dashing young ex-RAF pilot, Freddie Page (Tom Hiddleston), with whom she has fallen passionately in love. Set in post-war Britain, THE DEEP BLUE SEA is a study of forbidden love, suppressed desire, and the fear of loneliness but is at heart a deeply moving love story. Stuck between the devil and the deep blue sea, what - or whom - should Hester choose?
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Mr. Holmes
programme.desc: Academy Award® nominee Ian McKellen takes on the iconic role of Detective Sherlock Holmes in this exciting new twist on the world’s most famous detective. In 1947, the world famous sleuth has retired to a remote Sussex farmhouse, living in relative anonymity with only his housekeeper Mrs Munro and her young son, Roger, for company. Grappling with the diminishing powers of his mind — and frustrated with the misrepresentation of him in Watson’s best-selling novels — he diverts his attention to an unsolved case. As the mystery deepens, Sherlock tries desperately to recall the events of 30 years ago that ultimately led to his retirement.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Belle
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of Dido Elizabeth Belle, this powerful film stars Gugu Mbatha-Raw as the mixed-race daughter of a British Navy officer raised by her wealthy great-uncle and his wife. Although racism prevents her from enjoying the full advantages of her upbringing, Belle’s love for an idealistic young man sparks change that may impact generations to come.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: 6 Days
programme.desc: Following the armed seizure of the Iranian Embassy in London in April 1980, six tense days unfold as negotiations fail and fear grips the city. Inside, hostages endure uncertainty while outside, elite SAS commandos meticulously plan a daring rescue mission. The operation, executed with precision and bravery, becomes a defining moment in British military history, showcasing courage, discipline, and the power of swift, decisive action under extreme pressure.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: A funeral in which the dead is anything but the protagonist. The deceased is Daniel's father. He lives with his mother and girlfriend at the family house, and is in charge of organizing the event and paying for the expenses. To say goodbye to this kind man, apart from a coffin with the wrong body, a series of outrageous characters arrives: a brother-in-law on an acid trip, Daniel's hypochondriac friend who has perfect timing for making the most importunate comments, a prodigious but stingy son who lives in a New York, and a dwarf who claims part of the fortune.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: 44 Inch Chest
programme.desc: From the team behind Sexy Beast comes this potent exploration of the masculine ego at break point, set against the seedy back drop of London's gangster underbelly. Colin Diamond (Ray Winstone) is in agony. Shattered by the bombshell of his wife's (Joanne Whalley) infidelity with a young French waiter. His motley crew of friends– Old Man Peanut (John Hurt), Meredith (Ian McShane), Archie (Tom Wilkinson), and Mal (Stephen Dillane) – kidnap Loverboy, and assemble a kangaroo court so that Colin can restore his manhood with revenge. Loverboy's life is now at stake as Colin wrestles with heartbreak, anger, madness, love andself pity.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: A Little Chaos
programme.desc: A romantic drama following Sabine (Academy Award®-winner Kate Winslet), a strong-willed and talented landscape designer, who is chosen to build one of the main gardens at King Louis XIV's new palace at Versailles. In her new position of power, she challenges gender and class barriers while also becoming professionally and romantically entangled with the court's renowned landscape artist André Le Notre (Matthias Schoenaerts).
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Hyde Park on Hudson
programme.desc: In June 1939, President Franklin Delano Roosevelt (Academy Award-nominee Bill Murray) and his wife Eleanor (Olivia Williams) host the King and Queen of England (Samuel West, Olivia Colman) for a weekend at their upstate New York vacation home. Loverboy's life is now at stake as Colin wrestles with heartbreak, anger, madness, love andself pity.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Professor and the Madman
programme.desc: Based on the 1998 book `The Surgeon of Crowthorne' by Simon Winchester, the life of Professor James Murray is portrayed as he begins work on compiling words for the first edition of the Oxford English Dictionary in the mid-19th century. As he led the overseeing committee, the professor received over 10,000 entries from one source in particular - a patient at Broadmoor Criminal Lunatic Asylum, Dr William Minor.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Six Minutes To Midnight
programme.desc: Set in the summer of 1939, "Six Minutes to Midnight" follows Thomas Miller, an English teacher at the Augusta Victoria College, a finishing school for the daughters of high-ranking Nazi officials. As World War II looms, Miller discovers a conspiracy and must navigate dangerous waters to expose the truth and protect the students.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Mothering Sunday
programme.desc: On a warm spring day in 1924, house maid and foundling Jane Fairchild (Odessa Young) finds herself alone on Mother’s Day. Her employers, Mr and Mrs Niven (Colin Firth and Olivia Colman), are out and she has the rare chance to spend quality time with her secret lover, Paul (Josh O’Connor), the boy from the manor house nearby who is Jane’s long-term love despite the fact that he’s engaged to be married to another woman, a childhood friend and daughter of his parents’ friends. But events that neither can foresee will change the course of Jane’s life forever.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: AmStarDam
programme.desc: Combining classic fairytales with the wild world of Amsterdam, this riotous Lennox Brother's fantasy comedy is a coming of age story not for the faint hearted. Jack arrives in Amsterdam to find his father and through a momentary magical encounter, finds the secret weapon that could turn around his father's ailing marijuana coffee shop.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Almond and the Seahorse
programme.desc: What happens when you're ambushed by time? An archaeologist and an architect fight to re-imagine a future after traumatic brain injury leaves them adrift from the people they love.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Ammonite
programme.desc: In the 1840s, acclaimed self-taught palaeontologist Mary Anning works alone on the wild and brutal Southern English coastline of Lyme Regis. The days of her famed discoveries behind her, she now hunts for common fossils to sell to rich tourists to support herself and her ailing widowed mother. When one such tourist, Roderick Murchison, arrives in Lyme on the first leg of a European tour, he entrusts Mary with the care of his young wife Charlotte, who is recuperating from a personal tragedy. Mary, whose life is a daily struggle on the poverty line, cannot afford to turn him down but, proud and relentlessly passionate about her work, she clashes with her unwanted guest. They are two women from utterly different worlds. Yet despite the chasm between their social spheres and personalities, Mary and Charlotte discover they can each offer what the other has been searching for: the realisation that they are not alone. It is the beginning of a passionate and all-consuming love affair that will defy all social bounds and alter the course of both lives irrevocably.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Churchill
programme.desc: Tensions mount for the beleaguered British Prime Minister Winston Churchill (Brian Cox) in the days leading up to infamous Allied D-Day landings in Normandy, France in June, 1944. Fearful of repeating his deadly mistakes from World War I in the Battle of Gallipoli, exhausted by years of war, plagued by depression and obsessed with his historical destiny, Churchill is reluctant to embark on the large-scale campaign, one that the entire war effort hinges upon. Clashing with his Allied political opponents U.S. General Dwight D. Eisenhower (John Slattery) and British Field Marshal Bernard Law Montgomery (Julian Wadham), the troubled Churchill receives support and devotion from his wife, the brilliant and unflappable Clementine Churchill (Miranda Richardson). With her strength and shrewdness, “Clemmie” halts Winston’s physical, mental spiritual collapse and inspires him on to greatness.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Six Minutes To Midnight
programme.desc: Set in the summer of 1939, "Six Minutes to Midnight" follows Thomas Miller, an English teacher at the Augusta Victoria College, a finishing school for the daughters of high-ranking Nazi officials. As World War II looms, Miller discovers a conspiracy and must navigate dangerous waters to expose the truth and protect the students.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Slumber
programme.desc: Alice, a sleep doctor haunted by the mysterious death of her younger brother, must abandon all her rational scientific reasoning when she comes across a family terrorized by a demon that feeds on its victims by paralyzing them while they sleep. In order to defeat the dark spirit who was also responsible for her brother’s death, Alice must journey into her own nightmares.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Mothering Sunday
programme.desc: On a warm spring day in 1924, house maid and foundling Jane Fairchild (Odessa Young) finds herself alone on Mother’s Day. programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Cheerful Weather for the Wedding
programme.desc: On a crisp December morning in 1932, bride-to-be Dolly hides in her bedroom as her many family members arrive for the wedding with all the cheerfulness, chaos and grievances that go with such occasions. But trouble soon appears with the arrival of Joseph, Dolly’s lover from the previous summer, who, to her mother’s exasperation, throws Dolly’s feelings into turmoil.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: To Olivia
programme.desc: In 1962, writer Roald Dahl and his movie star wife Patricia Neal have retreated to the English countryside to bring up their young family. Tragically, their lives are turned upside down by the death of their daughter, Olivia. As the couple struggle through the loss, their grief becomes a source of redemption and strength which changes their destiny.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Man Who Invented Christmas
programme.desc: Author Charles Dickens combines events from real-life with his extravagant imagination to create the unforgettable characters and scenes of 'The Christmas Carol', permanently altering the holiday season into the celebratory event we know today.

programme.title: White Riot
programme.desc: Rubika Shah’s energising film charts a vital national protest movement. Rock Against Racism (RAR) was formed in 1976, prompted by ‘music’s biggest colonialist’ Eric Clapton and his support of racist MP Enoch Powell. White Riot blends fresh interviews with queasy archive footage to recreate a hostile environment of anti-immigrant hysteria and National Front marches. As neo-Nazis recruited the nation’s youth, RAR’s multicultural punk and reggae gigs provided rallying points for resistance. As founder Red Saunders explains: ‘We peeled away the Union Jack to reveal the swastika’. The campaign grew from Hoxton fanzine roots to 1978’s huge antifascist carnival in Victoria Park, featuring X-Ray Spex, Steel Pulse and of course The Clash, whose rock star charisma and gale-force conviction took RAR’s message to the masses.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Miracle Club
programme.desc: In 1967, three generations of spirited friends from Dublin chase miracles on a pilgrimage to Lourdes — and navigate unexpected revelations along the way.

programme.title: Hurricane
programme.desc: Polish pilots overcome prejudice to fight against the Luftwaffe with the Royal Air Force during the Second World War, in the hope of protecting both Great Britain and their own Poland from the German advance.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: Bill Nighy is Victor Maynard, a middle-aged, solitary assassin, who lives to please his formidable mother, Louisa (Eileen Atkins), despite his own peerless reputation for lethal efficiency. His professional routine is interrupted when he finds himself drawn to one of his intended victims, Rose (Emily Blunt). He spares her life, unexpectedly acquiring a young apprentice in the process, Tony (Rupert Grint). Believing Victor to be a private detective, his two new companions tag along, while he attempts to thwart the murderous attentions of his unhappy client (Rupert Everett).
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Route Irish
programme.desc: Fergus returns to his native Liverpool for the funeral of his childhood friend Frankie, a fellow private security contractor who has been killed on "Route Irish", the deadly and now infamous stretch of road between Baghdad airport and the Green Zone. Refusing to accept the official account of his best friend's death, Fergus launches his own investigation, fuelled by the discovery of a cell phone on which Frankie had recorded the shooting of an innocent Iraqi family just days before his own death. As his investigation ramps up - via frequent skype conversations with former security colleagues in Iraq and his interrogation of security firm officials in the UK - Fergus soon draws the heat of those he is investigating and a once dirty foreign war is transferred to the streets of Liverpool and pursued on home turf.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Cheerful Weather for the Wedding
programme.desc: On a crisp December morning in 1932, bride-to-be Dolly hides in her bedroom as her many family members arrive for the wedding with all the cheerfulness, chaos and grievances that go with such occasions. programme.desc: Polish pilots overcome prejudice to fight against the Luftwaffe with the Royal Air Force during the Second World War, in the hope of protecting both Great Britain and their own Poland from the German advance.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: Bill Nighy is Victor Maynard, a middle-aged, solitary assassin, who lives to please his formidable mother, Louisa (Eileen Atkins), despite his own peerless reputation for lethal efficiency. His professional routine is interrupted when he finds himself drawn to one of his intended victims, Rose (Emily Blunt). He spares her life, unexpectedly acquiring a young apprentice in the process, Tony (Rupert Grint). Believing Victor to be a private detective, his two new companions tag along, while he attempts to thwart the murderous attentions of his unhappy client (Rupert Everett).
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Belle
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of Dido Elizabeth Belle, this powerful film stars Gugu Mbatha-Raw as the mixed-race daughter of a British Navy officer raised by her wealthy great-uncle and his wife. Although racism prevents her from enjoying the full advantages of her upbringing, Belle’s love for an idealistic young man sparks change that may impact generations to come.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Animals
programme.desc: Laura and Tyler are two girls who like to party - drink, drugs and general debauchery infuse their days while their careers and lives remain on hold. As they drift into their thirties, reality begins to bite, but Laura and Tyler will not be tamed so easily. When aspiring writer Laura (Holliday Grainger) meets the devilishly handsome musician Jim, sparks fly. As their relationship intensifies, Laura's friendship with Tyler (Alia Shawkat) comes under pressure; Tyler wants to keep the party going, living a life without limitation as Laura begins to settle into her relationship with Jim.

programme.title: The Limehouse Golem
programme.desc: Detective Inspector John Kildare (Bill Nighy) is assigned to the case of the Limehouse Golem – a nefarious, calculating serial killer, murdering innocent, unconnected victims, leaving behind barely identifiable corpses – and his distinctive signature in blood. All is not what it seems and everyone is a suspect and everyone has a secret.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: The Iron Lady, starring Meryl Streep, tells the compelling story of Margaret Thatcher, a woman who smashed through the barriers of gender and class to be heard in a male-dominated world. The story concerns power and the price that is paid for power, and is a surprising and intimate portrait of an extraordinary and complex woman.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: McLaren
programme.desc: The story of Bruce McLaren, the New Zealander who showed the world that a man of humble beginnings could take on the elite of motor racing and win.

programme.title: Into the White
programme.desc: Norway, WWII. A group of British and German soldiers find themselves stranded in the wild after an aircraft battle. Finding shelter in the same cabin, they realise there is only one way to survive.

programme.title: Freight
programme.desc: A Russian gang operates a people trafficking operation out of Leeds, but are drawn into conflict with a local gangster. When the Russians abduct his daughter, the gangster calls in an old friend from his SAS days to rescue the girl and bring down her kidnappers. Action thriller, starring Craig Fairbrass and Billy Murray.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Belle
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of Dido Elizabeth Belle, this powerful film stars Gugu Mbatha-Raw as the mixed-race daughter of a British Navy officer raised by her wealthy great-uncle and his wife. Although racism prevents her from enjoying the full advantages of her upbringing, Belle’s love for an idealistic young man sparks change that may impact generations to come.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Attack The Block
programme.desc: Cult sci-fi comedy starring Jodie Whittaker, John Boyega, Nick Frost and Luke Treadaway. Bonfire night, South London. Sam, a trainee nurse, is making her way home when she's accosted by a gang of hooded teenage thugs demanding her wallet and phone. That is until a huge, flaming meteorite crash-lands into a nearby car. Sam makes her escape while the gang find themselves confronted by a rabid, ravenous extra-terrestrial with a craving for human flesh. Having killed the creature they soon realise that this is only the beginning. There are other aliens invading the earth and they're bigger, stronger and hungrier. Their only chance of survival is to take refuge within the concrete walls of their housing estate block. Teaming up with their initial victim Sam and local dealer Ron, the neighbourhood's biggest threat soon realise they could be the block's only hope. It's inner city versus outer space and it's about to get nasty.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
